description: Use this API to change the value of an integer ICON of the line relay model in the designated relay slot of the from bus end of a specified branch. The corresponding character CHRICN is set to ‘$$’. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_rlmod_icon(ibus, jbus, id, rs, name, j, idata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_rlmod_icon(ibus, jbus, id, rs, name, j, idata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: New integer icon value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no relay model on this branch at the bus IBUS end.
relay model at bus IBUS end is aaa not xxx.
no input ICONs used in model NAME.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
